items: Success starts the moment you stop making excuses.
The only limit is the one you set for yourself.
Dream big, work hard, stay focused.
Your only competition is the person you were yesterday.
Turn your wounds into wisdom and your pain into power.
Discipline is choosing what you want most over what you want now.
Every champion was once a beginner who refused to quit.
The harder the battle, the sweeter the victory.
Small daily improvements are the key to massive long-term success.
Stop waiting for the perfect moment. Take the moment and make it perfect.
Your future is created by what you do today, not tomorrow.
Be the energy you want to attract.
Comfort is the enemy of progress.
The pain of discipline is nothing compared to the pain of regret.
You are one decision away from a completely different life.
Fall seven times, stand up eight.
The best way to predict the future is to create it.
Don't watch the clock. Do what it does — keep going.

Your mindset determines your outcome.
Great things take time. Don't give up too soon.
The only way out is through.

Progress, not perfection.
You become what you believe.
Stay patient and trust your journey.

Don't stop until you're proud.
Your only limit is you.

Keep going. You're closer than you think.
The secret to success is to start.
Be stronger than your excuses.
You are capable of more than you know.

Everything you want is on the other side of fear.
